name: Hasami Shogi
author: AGP (traditional, Dai Hasami Shogi)
description: Hasami Shogi ('sandwiching chess'), Dai Hasami Shogi variant on a 9x9 board. Each side has 9 identical men filling its back row; every man moves like a rook. Capture is custodial (Tafl-style): your move that brackets one or more contiguous enemy men in a straight line between the moved man and a friendly man (or a held corner) removes them — capture happens only on your move. Win by reducing the opponent to a single man, or by forming an unbroken line of 5 of your own men (orthogonal or diagonal) entirely off your home row.
